plan.explanation: Upgrade json5 to the fixed 1.x release, then copy only the supported theme fields from the parsed value into a fresh object at the input boundary. This keeps the change small while adding a meaningful source-level defense independent of downstream consumers.
expectedCompatibilityRisks: Callers that rely on unrecognized theme fields will no longer receive those fields.
The fixed parser release may reject or normalize inputs differently from version 1.0.1.
proposedTests: Run the existing npm test suite before and after the change.
Add a targeted test showing that unsupported input keys are not copied into the returned theme.
Run the configured build syntax checks.
Rescan and require GHSA-9c47-m6qq-7p4h to disappear.
